role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused exclusively on the street sign text ('Rue du 27 MAI 1944') and language identification.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns (church spire, stone masonry).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific plant types (Ligustrum, Buxus) and their regional prevalence.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road signs (Vienna Convention style) and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural details (shutters, lamp brackets) and utility pole styles.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. The linguistic agent provided the definitive evidence (French text), while the regulatory and meta agents provided strong corroborating visual evidence (signage style, architecture). The tournament correctly prioritized the linguistic evidence to distinguish France from Belgium.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately quoted the visible street sign.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Correctly described the stone masonry, church spire, and vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified the visible hedges and trees.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the blue parking sign and red-bordered circular sign.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly noted the ornate lamp bracket and wooden pole.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly identified France as the final winner.
